text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Summer camp has come to an end.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Whew... That went by in a flash.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: It really did. But we made every day count.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I'm looking forward to your Shuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I'm excited for your Kikuka Sho as well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It seems they both had a fulfilling summer camp!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As the blazing summer ends, the splendor of
autumn begins to unfurl.
